CustomField.description: Account__r.Hub_Zone__c (CounselingRecord_CounselorRecord_Certifications_Code) - Values from SBA include: 8(a), Hubzones, Small Disadvantage Business, Economically Disadvantaged Women-Owned Small Business, Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business, Veteran Owned Small Business, Women-Owned Small Business, Other

CustomField.label: Certifications_CounselorRecord
